bridge_strategy: start from verifiedswap22_bit33eq2, then combine the exact four frontier-over-repro absent rows from reprogap4, the five quality-focused numeric anchors from verifiedmix, and the single absent reverse-gap answer_only numeric row from reprogap5 while trimming the easiest five gravity and five unit stabilizers
